markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new engagement manager and align on content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Engagement Manager:** Bailey Seybolt (GrowthX) is the new engagement manager, bringing 10+ years of B2B SaaS growth marketing experience.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Aligned:** The next 3 months will prioritize high-intent competitive content and foundational AI agent topics. Vertical focus shifts from broad "Healthcare" to specific "Insurance."](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [**Proactive Content Briefings:** Devon will provide 30-min product deep-dives (e.g., AI Agent vs. Agent Assist) to improve content quality and reduce review cycles.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [**LLM Performance Tracked:** Cresta is gaining LLM citations (via Check That) and direct traffic (via GA4) from ChatGPT, Copilot, and Gemini, validating the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

## Topics

### Team & Process Alignment

  - [**New Engagement Manager:** Bailey Seybolt (GrowthX) is the new engagement manager.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
      - [**Background:** 10+ years in B2B SaaS growth marketing (e.g., Greenhouse, insurance/security).](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
      - [**Context:** Familiar with Cresta's strategy from the initial sprint phase.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Process Improvement:** Devon proposed proactive content briefings to improve quality and reduce review cycles.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A 30-min briefing can save 5–10x that in backend editing time.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [**Example:** The recent briefing with Orin was highly effective, providing critical context for the GrowthX editor.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)

### Content Strategy & Prioritization

  - [**3-Month Plan:** Aligned on a phased content plan to support Cresta's goals.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
      - [**Months 1–2:**](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
          - [**Competitive Comparisons:** High-intent, bottom-of-funnel content.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
          - [**AI Agents & Customer Experience:** Foundational topics to build authority.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
      - [**Month 3:**](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
          - [**Vertical-Specific Guides:**](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
            1.  [Travel & Hospitality](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
            2.  [**Insurance** (new focus, replacing broad "Healthcare")](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
            3.  [Financial Services](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
          - [**Contact Center Operations:** High-volume, top-of-funnel topics to fill content gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
  - [**Competitive Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create multiple articles targeting unique keywords for key competitors (e.g., Sierra, Decagon) to maximize ranking opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Capitalize on competitors' brand spend and capture their branded search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
      - [**UX Concern:** A guide page dominated by competitor articles creates a poor user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
      - [**Action:** Annie will add a task to the Web Strategy sync to redesign the guide page, prioritizing thought leadership and de-emphasizing competitive content.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [**Product Positioning Clarification:**](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
      - [**AI Agent:** A specific Cresta product.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
      - [**Agent Assist:** Cresta's oldest product, focused on real-time augmentation (behavioral guidance, knowledge, automation).](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
      - [**QM & Coaching:** A separate product pillar for post-call analysis and agent performance evaluation.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [**New Topic Idea: AI Regulations**](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)
      - [**Proposal:** Create authoritative content on emerging AI regulations (e.g., EU AI Act, US proposals).](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)
      - [**Rationale:** An emerging, high-relevance topic for Cresta's ICP with potential for early ownership.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will research search volume and competition to assess viability.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=2020.0)

### Performance & Tracking

  - [**LLM Performance (Check That):**](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Methodology:** GrowthX runs 200+ target keyword prompts to simulate user queries and track citations.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
      - [**Findings:** Cresta guides are being cited in LLM responses, particularly for commercial keywords like "best AI agent platform."](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**Direct LLM Traffic (GA4):**](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [**Methodology:** The Looker dashboard tracks real user traffic from LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [**Findings:** Cresta is receiving traffic from ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot, and Google Gemini to comparison and educational posts.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [**HubSpot Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
      - [**Suggestion:** Import published blog URLs into HubSpot to track customer journeys from organic search to product pages, case studies, or demo requests.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:** Schedule product deep-dive meetings with Devon (Intro, AI Agent).](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [**Annie:** Add "Redesign Guide Page UX" to the next Web Strategy sync agenda.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)
      - [Research viability of "AI Regulations" topic cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=2020.0)
      - [Adjust topic list for the "Insurance" vertical.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
      - [Confirm GA4 access and notify Annie if issues persist.](https://fathom.video/share/_ykPxAXkx6eMVRpR4jwBou3ahr5VkxBw?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
